source: MÖRK BORG Bare Bones Edition, p.38–40
bodies: One hand replaced with rusting hook (d6 damage).
Cataracts slowly but surely spreading in both eyes.
Long tangled hair, at least one cockroach in residence.
Juddering and stuttering from nerve damage or stress.
One hand lacks thumb and index finger, grips like a lobster.
Resting maniac face, making friends is hard.
Recently slashed and stinking eye covered with a patch.
Nails cracked and black, maybe about to drop off.
habits: Obsessively collects small sharp stones.
Won't use a blade without testing it on their own flesh.
Can't stop drinking once they start.
Gambling addict. Must bet every day.
Cannot tolerate criticism. Rage and weeping.
Unable to get to the point. Never finishes a story.
Best friend is a skull. Carries it everywhere.
Picks their nose so deep it bleeds.
Laughs hysterically at their own jokes, then explains them.
A nihilist. Insists on telling everyone, at length.
Inveterate bug eater.
Stress response is aesthetic display — the worse, the fancier.
Permanent phlegm deposit. Continuous coughing and spitting.
Pyromaniac.
Loses important items, forgets vital facts.
Insecure shit-stirrer — gossips the moment anyone leaves.
Stutters when lying.
Giggles insanely at the worst possible times.
Whistles while trying to hide. Will deny this.
Makes jewelry from the teeth of the dead.
